list.name: coin
list.label: Coin
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT coin FROM book_levels ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT coin FROM book_levels ORDER BY 1

options.content: **Everyone's resting limit orders** for `$coin`, aggregated by price (public L2 book, top 20 levels/side). Heatmap colour = total resting size at each price offset from mid. _Stop-loss / take-profit trigger orders are private on Hyperliquid and are **not** shown here — they don't exist in any public feed._

panels.title: Resting depth heatmap — size by bps from mid

targets.rawSql:
WITH mids AS (
  SELECT time,
         max(px) FILTER (WHERE side='bid' AND lvl=0) AS bid0,
         min(px) FILTER (WHERE side='ask' AND lvl=0) AS ask0
  FROM book_levels
  WHERE coin='$coin' AND lvl=0 AND $__timeFilter(time)
  GROUP BY time
), binned AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('$__interval'::interval, b.time) AS t,
         (round((((b.px/((m.bid0+m.ask0)/2.0))-1)*10000)/5.0)*5)::int AS bps_bin,
         b.sz
  FROM book_levels b
  JOIN mids m USING (time)
  WHERE b.coin='$coin' AND $__timeFilter(b.time)
)
SELECT t AS "time", bps_bin::text AS metric, sum(sz) AS depth
FROM binned
WHERE abs(bps_bin) <= 50
GROUP BY t, bps_bin
ORDER BY t

panels.title: Resting depth: bid vs ask (sum of top 20 levels)
panels.description: Total resting size on each side. Bid > ask = more buy-side resting liquidity, and vice-versa.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time_bucket('$__interval'::interval, time) AS "time",
       side AS metric,
       sum(sz) AS depth
FROM book_levels
WHERE coin='$coin' AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY 1, side
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('$__interval'::interval, time) AS "time",
       'spread_bps' AS metric,
       (min(px) FILTER (WHERE side='ask' AND lvl=0) - max(px) FILTER (WHERE side='bid' AND lvl=0))
       / nullif((min(px) FILTER (WHERE side='ask' AND lvl=0) + max(px) FILTER (WHERE side='bid' AND lvl=0))/2, 0) * 10000 AS spread_bps
FROM book_levels
WHERE coin='$coin' AND lvl=0 AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Largest resting walls (latest snapshot)
panels.description: Biggest aggregated limit-order clusters right now, by side, with distance from mid.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT max(time) AS t FROM book_levels WHERE coin='$coin' AND $__timeFilter(time)
), mid AS (
  SELECT (max(b.px) FILTER (WHERE b.side='bid' AND b.lvl=0)
        + min(b.px) FILTER (WHERE b.side='ask' AND b.lvl=0))/2.0 AS m
  FROM book_levels b, latest WHERE b.coin='$coin' AND b.time=latest.t AND b.lvl=0
)
SELECT b.side,
       b.px,
       round(b.sz::numeric, 4) AS sz,
       b.n AS orders,
       round((((b.px/mid.m)-1)*10000)::numeric, 2) AS bps_from_mid
FROM book_levels b, latest, mid
WHERE b.coin='$coin' AND b.time=latest.t
ORDER BY b.sz DESC
LIMIT 12
